message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  BorderColor #333333
}
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor #E8E8FF
  BorderColor #333333
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #E8E8FF
  BorderColor #333333
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #DDDDDD
  BorderColor #333333
}

database "tuple" as T
actor "Upper\nlayer" as U

box "IP Layer" #DDDDDD
  participant "IPv4\nlayer" as IPV4
  database "Routing\ntable" as RT
end box

box "IPv4 Inetreface" #DDDDDD
  participant "IPv4\ninterface" as IF
  database "ARP" as ARP
end box

actor "Lower\nlayer" as L

note left of U
IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
end note

U -> IPV4 : IPdata

note over IPV4
Allocate
IPv4
header
end note

IPV4 -> RT : dst=192.0.2.1
RT --> IPV4

note left of U
IPv4.oif=ifp1
IPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
end note

IPV4 -> IF

IF -> ARP : gw=198.51.100.1

note right of ARP
enqueue
packet
end note

ARP --> IF : ARP request
IF -> L

L -> IF : ARP response
IF -> ARP

ARP --> IF : resolved\npackets

IF -> IF : send as\nsend\nthread

IF -> L
@enduml
```
